title: No Label - Barbecue Grill brush 3 in 1
features: Very compact model brush to clean the barbecue
Clean the barbecue quickly and easy with this 3-in-1 brush
Contains a brush, nylon scouring pad and a metal scraper
With a sturdy handle to use extra force
description: A useful 3-in-1 cleaning brush. This brush is perfect for quickly cleaning the barbecue. The combination of metal scraper, nylon scouring pad and brush provides optimal results.
